verification_notes: Static inspection: index.html loads CSS + rules-engine.js + ai-opponent.js + ui-render.js + controller.js in correct order; no external URLs; controller.js consumes RE.createBoard/applyMove/checkOutcome + AI.chooseMove + UI.mount/render/onCellClick/onRestart; uses setTimeout for AI delay; defensive ignores for illegal clicks. Full integrated runtime exercise will happen in wave 4 (edge-case-testing).

sub_goals.description: Build index.html (loads CSS + 4 JS in correct order), controller.js (turn-flow state machine: human X click -> applyMove -> checkOutcome -> AI delay -> AIOpponent.chooseMove -> applyMove -> checkOutcome -> render). Restart wired to UIRender.onRestart. No external network, no persistence.
